meta.title: A Book Discussion of The Idealist: Jeffrey Sachs and the Que
meta.description: Asked about the "core takeaway" from her new book The Idealist: Jeffrey Sachs and the Quest to End Poverty http://www.amazon.com/The-Idealist-Jeffrey-Sachs-Poverty/dp/0385525818/ref=sr_1_1?ie=UTF8&qid=1392136803&sr=8-1&keywords=idealist," author Nina Munk told the Deseret News: "In the quest to end poverty it is important to understand that theories we develop in academic environments can't anticipate the chaos of the real world.
